---
title: "Series"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

This blog is organized around long-form series exploring a mathematical topic in depth, alongside standalone posts.

---

## Pathological Periodicity

An exploration of the set of periods of periodic functions $f:\mathbb{R}\to\mathbb{R}$, the surprising pathologies that arise when the axiom of choice is assumed, and related matters in real analysis and set theory. Read from the beginning — the series is designed to be followed in order.

[→ View all posts in this series](pathological-periodicity.html)
